subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which the infidel declared, after We sheltered him beneath the shade of the Tree and protected him through Our sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما قاله المشرک بالله بعدما اویناه فی ظل الشجره و حفظناه بسلطانی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement
